---
title: "visualisation"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(naniar)
library(dplyr)

data_eng_processed <- read.csv("processed_translation_data_4.csv")
data_eng_processed <- data_eng_processed |> select(-X, -id, -author_of_translated_book_under_review_to_be_removed)
```


```{r}
vis_miss(data_original, warn_large_data = F) 
```


```{r}
vis_miss(data_eng_processed, warn_large_data = F) 
```

```{r}
gg_miss_upset(data_eng_processed)
```

```{r}
gg_miss_fct(x = data_eng_processed, fct = publication_type)
```
```{r}
gg_miss_fct(x = data_eng_processed, fct = target_audience)
```
